text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm... My hands are a looking a little rough.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Is this detergent too harsh? I should try wearing
rubber gloves next time...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: No way! What am I going all soft for?!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'm gonna run away from a one-on-one with my laundry!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm not givin' up till the very end! I'll defeat the
rest with my bare hands!

Hishi Amazon's own stubbornness leads her to
suffer from dry hands.
